subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! It is now the afternoon hour, and weariness from the heat of the day and the abundance of writing hath overtaken me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء بعد از عصراست و خسته گی از گرمی هوا و کثرت تحریر اوراق
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
